assertions.title: Build endpoint triggers real file generation

steps.action: Capture deterministic baseline (GET /api/status, output file list), then call POST /api/build
steps.expected: Build returns 200 with version/task results and reports/generated files on disk
steps.observed: POST /api/build returned 200 with version=22 and summary/tasks_count, but files_written_count=0

steps.action: Compare output file list before and after build
steps.expected: At least one newly generated file appears after build
steps.observed: new_output_file_count=0; output tree unchanged (only pre-existing output/v19 files)

assertions.issues: Build response included version/task fields but did not report or produce newly generated files during this run.

assertions.title: CRUD generation records traceability links

steps.action: Capture GET /api/traceability baseline, run POST /api/build, then GET /api/traceability again
steps.expected: Entity specs have CRUD artifact links with all required types (implementation, type, migration, test)
steps.observed: Traceability returned 200 before/after, but 0 entities had all required types; entity type coverage was implementation=7, type=0, migration=0, test=1

steps.expected: Build introduces or updates CRUD traceability links

assertions.issues: Traceability link typing/coverage for entity CRUD artifacts is incomplete and unchanged by build; required per-entity 4-type coverage is not met.

frictions.description: Shared runtime had pre-existing output and traceability data, so deterministic validation required explicit before/after snapshots and diffs.
frictions.resolution: Used baseline/post-build file and traceability comparisons to isolate build-run effects.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 2 failed (VAL-CGEN-009, VAL-CROSS-031), 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
